params.name: Plato's Republic
params.source:
* Grandmaster Scrolls (1%), Lottery Machine (0.12%), Relic Forge (100 Relic RF), Wishing (0.1%)
* Home Value Pack III ($14.99)
params.description:
On Nov 24, 369 BC, Plato returned to Athens and completed the book of "Republic" at the Academy.

This 10-volume book is written using dialogues with Socrates as the protagonist. It is a complication of Plato's philosophical thought as well as discussion on various subjects, including philosophy, politics, ethics, education, literature and art. Based on the theories of philosophy, an ideal system for a country has been established.

[Book Review]
